name: minsung - Royal
description:
Back in 19th-century England. Two very distinct young men whose fates became intertwined.

The handsome, clever and intelligent Prince Lee Minho, somewhat stern but fair and straightforward by nature.

And Han Jisung.. works as a sculptor in a workshop, crafting pieces from clay. He has skilled hands, a kind and sincere heart, and innocent eyes. Yet he always avoids trouble and scandals.

Will he be able to escape again?
creator: Hansung
